_source: Built from strategies.json / tablets.json community ratings (Phase 9, 2026-07-05)
_rule: Tablets cannot have more than 4 modifiers, so every preset selects at most 4 and the trade builder blocks searches with more than 4 selected modifiers.

presets.name: Best currency chances (max 4)
presets.description: The four community SS/S-rated general-currency modifiers: Pack Size, more Rare Monsters, an extra random map modifier, and Waystone quantity. Matches tablets with at least 2 of the 4 (raise COUNT min for stricter results).

presets.name: Waystone sustain
presets.description: Waystone quantity first, density second. Combine with Overseer 'of Pathways' (boss preset) for boss-based sustain.

presets.name: Magic find / rarity
presets.description: Item rarity, monster rarity, and density for MF-focused builds.

presets.name: Ritual omen farming
presets.description: Omen chance and extra rerolls are the two SS Ritual suffixes; density fills the rest.

presets.name: Breach density
presets.description: Breach pack size, extra rare on stabilise, and general density.

presets.name: Delirium simulacrum splinters
presets.description: Splinter stack size plus Delirium and general density.

presets.name: Abyss volume
presets.description: More Abysses (chance and guaranteed) plus extra rares per Abyss.

presets.name: Boss loot (Overseer)
presets.description: Boss rarity/quantity and Waystone drops - the three S-rated Overseer suffixes.

presets.name: Experience boosting (leveling)
presets.description: XP-leveling setup: 'Elevated' (#% increased Experience gain in Map, 12-18) is the direct XP modifier; Pack Size, Rare Monsters, and Magic Monsters multiply kills and therefore XP. Tip: to REQUIRE the Experience mod, untick the others or switch to AND with just Elevated + one density mod.

presets.name: Boss experience (Overseer)
presets.description: Boss-XP pushing: 'of Conquering' (Map Bosses grant 40-80% increased Experience) plus the shared Experience-gain prefix and density. Pairs with boss-density Atlas choices (Hilda Mighty Prey / Patient Battue).

presets.name: Temple / Vaal Beacons (experimental)
presets.description: Temple farming value is still experimental - rolls verified against PoE2DB in Phase 5, but strategy value is unproven.
